project_type: Python Colab notebook pipeline (ComfyUI-based video generation)
build_system: None (Colab notebook, no formal build system). AST validation via `python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('LTX_PRO.py').read())"` is the primary check.
test_framework: No test suite. Verification is AST parse + grep for expected symbols.
verification_instructions: 1. AST parse all .py files. 2. Grep for key function/class names to ensure nothing is broken. 3. Verify new VRAM management functions exist.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - AST validation only.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network. Cannot run the actual pipeline (requires GPU + ComfyUI + models). Validation is purely structural (AST parse, grep checks).
contribution_requirements: Maintain AST validity across all 3 Python files. Preserve all existing functionality. Changes must be additive and non-breaking.
key_patterns: VRAMManager class at line 290. InlinePromptArchitect at line 402 with _unload_model(). InlineVisionDescribe at line 860 with _unload(). cleanup_memory() at line 1400. aggressive_cleanup() at line 1410. run_easy_prompt() at line 1878 calls NODE_CLASS_MAPPINGS['LTX2PromptArchitect']().generate() with keep_model_loaded=False. generate_pro() at line 4241 calls run_easy_prompt then cleanup_memory then DualCLIPLoader. LTX2EasyPromptLD.py uses device_map='auto' which creates accelerate dispatch hooks that survive .to('cpu'). LTX2VisionEasyPromptLD.py uses same device_map='auto' pattern.
directory_structure: /projects/sandbox/ltx/ contains: LTX_PRO.py (6918 lines, main pipeline), LTX2EasyPromptLD.py (ComfyUI prompt node), LTX2VisionEasyPromptLD.py (ComfyUI vision node), LD-I2V.json (workflow), SVI-Pro-Workflow.json (workflow)
